outreach.linkedin_note: Hi Delroy, this is Jamie! I recently applied for the Culture & Employee Experience Specialist role at FUJIFILM and came across your profile on the people-programs side. I come from an Organizational Psychology + people background and would love to connect and hear about your work there. Thanks!
outreach.email_subject: Interest in FUJIFILM's Culture & Employee Experience Specialist role — Jamie Cheng
outreach.email_body:
Hi Delroy,

I hope you're settling into the week well! Apologies if this is a bit out of the blue — I came across your profile while looking into the Culture & Employee Experience Specialist role at FUJIFILM, which I recently applied for, and wanted to reach out personally in case the application alone doesn't capture the full picture.

I'm trained in Organizational Psychology, and I run cross-functional programs and support the employee experience — pairing qualitative and quantitative analysis to surface what actually moves engagement. Most of that has been at a fast-growing startup and a multinational, which is part of why a global company like FUJIFILM resonates with me.

I'd genuinely love to hear what the Culture & EX team is like day-to-day, and how you've found building people programs there. I've attached my resume — thanks so much for your time, Delroy!

Warmly,
Jamie
outreach.voice_check: No 'fellow practitioner' claim. No fabricated affinity. Self-intro slot = programs + EX + data (all true). Company-type line = startup + multinational (true). No referral ask. Portland hook omitted (role is remote, recipient region unknown).

outreach.linkedin_note: Hi Joel, this is Jamie! I recently applied for the HR Generalist role at Lineage and noticed you're an HR Generalist there too. I'd genuinely love to connect and hear about your experience on the HR side at Lineage. Thanks so much!
outreach.email_subject: Interest in Lineage's HR Generalist role — Jamie Cheng
outreach.email_body:
Hi Joel,

I hope you're having a good week! Apologies if this is a bit out of the blue — I recently applied for the HR Generalist role at Lineage (Portland site) and came across your profile as an HR Generalist there.

I come from an Organizational Psychology background with about three years across people/HR and program work, including HR-generalist responsibilities, employee relations support, and onboarding at a multinational. I was drawn to Lineage's site-HR model and the chance to partner closely with operations leaders.

I'd genuinely love to hear what the HR Generalist experience is actually like at Lineage. Thanks so much for your time, Joel!

Warmly,
Jamie
outreach.voice_check: No 'fellow' over-claim (says 'an HR Generalist there too' = factual same-title note). No fabricated affinity. Self-intro = true. Weak reach flagged honestly — Jamie may choose to skip.
